# Day 1: Foundations

## Slides
* 📄 [Download Day 1 Lecture Slides (PDF)](../slides/lecture1.pdf)

## Jupyter notebooks
* 📓 [Download Notebook 1](../notebooks/day1/notebook1.ipynb)

## Exercises
* 📝 [Download Exercise 1](../exercises/day1/exercise1.pdf)

## Self-study
Add reading material and links here.
